study_group_representative.quote: We discuss COVID-19 control approaches in selected African countries

intervention_and_participants_defined.quote: In South Africa, approximately 28 000 community healthcare workers (CHCWs) have been deployed. By the end of April 2020, more than 6 million people had been screened and 42 000 referred for testing.

outcome_assessed_for_60pct.quote: By the end of April 2020, more than 6 million people had been screened and 42 000 referred for testing.

follow_up_length_reported.quote: Figure 1. Coronavirus disease 2019 community screening by subdistrict in Cape Town, South Africa, 4 April 2020 to 22 May 2020.

outcome_assessors_blinded.quote: The provided text does not mention blinding of outcome assessors.

outcome_definition_objective_precise.quote: Sixteen percent of those screened were referred for testing at health facilities (range, 4%– 48% by subdistrict).

important_prognostic_factors_accounted_f.quote: The provided text does not describe accounting for prognostic factors such as age or gender in the reported data.

analysis_described_and_effect_quantified.quote: The provided text describes program activities and provides descriptive statistics but does not quantify the effect of the intervention through a formal analysis.
